title: The Leonardo Collection Lodden Spoon Rest by William Morris | Porcelain Kitchen Utensil Holder Dish | Classic Arts and Crafts Floral Design | Elegant Cooking Accessory | Stylish British Home Gift
features: Beautiful Lodden Design by William Morris:Showcases the iconic Lodden floral pattern, inspired by the Arts and Crafts movement, bringing timeless style and artistic charm to your kitchen countertop or stove area.

Keeps Worktops Clean and Organised:Provides a designated resting place for spoons and utensils during cooking, helping to prevent mess and protect surfaces while adding elegance to your daily kitchen routine.

Crafted from Durable Glazed Porcelain:Made from high-quality porcelain with a smooth glazed finish, this spoon rest is sturdy, easy to clean, and designed for long-lasting use in any traditional or modern kitchen.

Ideal for Everyday Cooking Tasks:Perfectly sized to hold spoons, spatulas, or small ladles, it offers a practical solution for busy kitchens while complementing other William Morris tableware and accessories.

Perfect Gift for Art and Home Enthusiasts:A thoughtful gift for fans of William Morris or anyone who appreciates refined kitchenware, ideal for birthdays, housewarmings, or adding artistic flair to everyday cooking.
